summary: BUG 3 re-test only. Programme structure now renders real week titles ('Phone as Production Studio', 'AI Basics', 'Choose One Income Module', 'Community Client Pilot', 'Packaging and Pricing', 'Cooperative Marketplace'). 4 of 6 weeks are tappable with chevron-forward indicators (W1, W3, W4, W6). Tapping programme-week-3 ('Choose One Income Module') successfully routed to /income and the Income & Asset Module Bank list rendered. BUG 3 is FIXED.
notes: W2 (AI Basics) and W5 (Packaging and Pricing) intentionally have no route target as none of the keyword triggers match — this is correct behaviour, not a bug; the design only routes weeks whose theme/body matches the keyword set. Requirement was 'at least 3 tappable rows' — satisfied (4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG 3 fully verified fixed in iteration_9_1. /app/frontend/app/programme.tsx now reads w.title || w.theme || w.focus for headings and routes weeks whose combined text matches an expanded keyword set. W3 'Choose One Income Module' -> /income works. No further work required on this bug.
rca_of_issue: Root cause was a payload schema mismatch: the /api/programme backend returns weeks with fields {title, description, activities} but the frontend originally read only {theme, focus}, producing empty headings (or a literal 'Week' fallback). The expanded keyword set + dual-key read resolves it.
